title: Corrosion test chamber for armoured flexible pipe
abstract: The test apparatus (1) comprises: - a body (2) defining a test chamber (3), the test chamber (3) being delimited by a sample holding surface (11), - a test sample placed inside the test chamber (3) on the sample holding surface (11), the test sample comprising a plurality of wire sections, and - a fluid inlet for injecting a test fluid into the test chamber (3), The ratio of the free volume of the test chamber (3) containing the test sample to the outer surface of the test sample is equal or less than 0.1 mL/cm 2 .
claims: Claims 1 . - A test apparatus (1 ) comprising: - a body (2) defining a test chamber (3), the test chamber (3) being delimited by a sample holding surface (1 1 ), - a test sample (17) placed inside the test chamber (3) on the sample holding surface (1 1 ), the test sample (17) comprising a plurality of wire sections, and - a fluid inlet (15) for injecting a test fluid into the test chamber (3), characterized in that the ratio of the free volume of the test chamber (3) containing the test sample (17) to the outer surface of the test sample (17) is equal or less than 0.1 mL/cm 2 and in that the test apparatus (1 ) further comprises a first polymeric layer (27) interposed between the test sample (17) and the sample holding surface (1 1 ). 2. - The test apparatus (1 ) according to claim 1 , wherein the sample holding surface (1 1 ) is flat. 3. - The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of claims 1 or 2, comprising an intermediate injection chamber (13), located below the sample holding surface (1 1 ), the sample holding surface (1 1 ) allowing the passage of test fluid from the intermediate injection chamber (13) to the test chamber (3). 4. - The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the test sample (17) comprises a plurality of parallel wire sections. 5.- The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the test sample (17) comprises a first layer of parallel wire sections and at least a second layer of parallel wire sections disposed at an angle relative to the parallel wire sections of the first layer. 6.- The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of preceding claims, comprising a confining ring (23) at the periphery of the first polymeric layer (27) to prevent the test fluid from entering into the test chamber (3) without passing through the first polymeric layer (27). 7.- The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of the preceding claims, comprising a second polymeric layer (29) located above the test sample (17), between the test sample (17) and the top of the test chamber (3). 8.- The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of the preceding claims, comprising a reception gas enclosure (33) located above the test chamber (3) to receive the gases arising from the test chamber (3). 9. - The test apparatus (1 ) according to claim 8, wherein the body (2) delimits holes (39) to let the gas pass from the test chamber (3) to the reception gas enclosure (33). 10. - The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of the preceding claims, comprising at least a sensor arranged inside the test chamber (3) through at least an instrumentation port (31 ). 1 1 . - The test apparatus (1 ) according to any one of the preceding claims, comprising an internal plate (21 ) inserted into the test chamber (3) to limit the size of the test chamber (3). 12.- A method of testing a test sample (17) using a test apparatus (1 ), said method including the following steps: - providing a body (2) defining a test chamber (3), the test chamber (3) being delimited by a sample holding surface (1 1 ), the test sample (17) comprising a plurality of wire sections, - placing a test sample (17) inside the test chamber (3) on the sample holding surface (1 1 ), - injecting a test fluid into the test chamber (3) using a fluid inlet (15), characterized in that the ratio of the free volume of the test chamber (3) containing the test sample (17) to the outer surface of the test sample (17) is equal or less than 0.1 mL/cm 2 and in that the method further comprises a step of interposing a first polymeric layer (27) between the test sample (17) and the sample holding surface (1 1 ). 13.- The method according to claim 12, comprising a step of interposing a second polymeric layer (29) between the test sample (17) and the top of test chamber (3).
